data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_Welcome: Hi! Sorry to keep you waiting!\pWelcome to the world of POKéMON!\pMy name is BIRCH.\pBut everyone calls me the POKéMON\nPROFESSOR.\p
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_ThisIsPokemon: This is what we call a “POKéMON.”
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_WorldInhabitedByPokemon:
This world is widely inhabited by
creatures known as POKéMON.\pWe humans live alongside POKéMON,
at times as friendly playmates, and\lat times as cooperative workmates.\pAnd sometimes, we band together
and battle others like us.\pBut despite our closeness, we don't
know everything about POKéMON.\pIn fact, there are many, many
secrets surrounding POKéMON.\pTo unravel POKéMON mysteries,
I've been undertaking research.\lThat's what I do.\p
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_AreYouBoyOrGirl: Are you a boy?\nOr are you a girl?
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_AhOkayYouArePlayer: Ah, okay!\pYou're {PLAYER}{KUN} who's moving to my\nhometown of LITTLEROOT.\lI get it now!
data/text/birch_speech.inc.gBirchSpeech_AreYouReady:
All right, are you ready?\pYour very own adventure is about
to unfold.\pTake courage, and leap into the
world of POKéMON where dreams,\ladventure, and friendships await!\pWell, I'll be expecting you later.
Come see me in my POKéMON LAB.\p
